free_text: Nuclear structure of calcium isotopes from inelastic
momentum analyzed using an Enge split-pole magnetic
spectrometer and detected in the focal plane using
either a 30 cm long position sensitive proportional
detector, or 5 cm long position sensitive silicon
detectors or K-1, 50 mu-m photographic emulsions.
The targets consisted of isotopically separated
metallic calcium evaporated onto 20 mu-g/cm2 carbon
analysis was used to interpret the reaction results.
No information on source of uncertainties.

which is unresolved from the 41Ca peak.
